title: Adapter Bearer Auth
description: Standalone `specd-studio-web` and desktop remote profiles may point at an API that eventually requires tokens. This adapter only adds `Authorization: Bearer` on outbound HTTP for remote profiles; it does not implement server auth and is unused for embedded same-origin or desktop local IPC.
context: Standalone `specd-studio-web` and desktop remote profiles may point at an API that eventually requires tokens. This adapter only adds `Authorization: Bearer` on outbound HTTP for remote profiles; it does not implement server auth and is unused for embedded same-origin or desktop local IPC.

rules.requirement: bearer header is added only for remote connection profiles
rules: When the active Studio connection profile includes a non-empty API token, outgoing HTTP requests MUST include `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

rules.requirement: embedded and desktop local profiles omit Authorization
rules: Same-origin `specd ui serve` and desktop local IPC profiles MUST NOT add an `Authorization` header.

rules.requirement: bearer adapter does not validate tokens
rules: The adapter MUST NOT validate tokens locally; HTTP 401 responses MUST be handled by `client:adapter-problem-json-errors`.

constraints: @specd/ui and @specd/client MUST NOT import @specd/core or @specd/sdk for kernel bootstrap.
HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

scenarios.requirement: bearer header is added only for remote connection profiles
scenarios.name: Remote profile sends Authorization
then: request headers include Authorization: Bearer sekret

scenarios.requirement: bearer header is added only for remote connection profiles
scenarios.name: Embedded profile omits Authorization

scenarios.requirement: bearer header is added only for remote connection profiles
scenarios.name: Empty token omits Authorization header
given: remote profile is selected but token is empty
then: AND request still targets the configured base URL

scenarios.requirement: embedded and desktop local profiles omit Authorization
scenarios.name: Same-origin ui serve omits Authorization
given: Studio uses embedded specd ui serve profile
when: HTTP transport issues a same-origin request

scenarios.requirement: embedded and desktop local profiles omit Authorization
scenarios.name: Desktop local IPC omits Authorization
given: desktop app uses local IPC data adapter
when: data call does not go through HTTP transport
then: bearer adapter is not in the IPC path
AND no Authorization header is injected

scenarios.requirement: embedded and desktop local profiles omit Authorization
scenarios.name: Switching to remote profile adds Bearer
given: user selects a remote profile with token configured
when: next HTTP request is sent through remote transport

scenarios.requirement: bearer adapter does not validate tokens
scenarios.name: Adapter does not verify JWT or API key locally
when: bearer middleware attaches a token to the request
then: adapter does not parse or reject the token

scenarios.requirement: bearer adapter does not validate tokens
scenarios.name: HTTP 401 is handled by problem-json errors adapter
given: remote API returns HTTP 401 with problem body
then: AND bearer adapter does not mask the 401

scenarios.requirement: bearer adapter does not validate tokens
scenarios.name: Invalid token reaches the server unchanged
then: AND server decides validity; adapter does not short-circuit
